title: Tasty Wholesome Wagyu Zanzibari Pilaf
description: A sweet and dense kid-friendly Kenyan dish featuring wagyu beef, prepared with beurre-monte for a luxurious twist that is both satvik and light.

ingredients.name: wagyu steak
ingredients.notes: should be at least 16% fat content

instructions: Chop sweet potatoes and bell peppers into small cubes.
In a skillet over medium heat, toast garlic paste and ginger paste until fragrant.
Add rice and stir for about 2 minutes or until it starts to turn golden brown.
Fold in tomato puree and let cook for an additional minute.
Mix wagyu steak with some of the beurre-monté mixture.
Transfer all ingredients to a baking dish, layering sweet potatoes, bell peppers, and the rice mix alternately.
Bake for 40 minutes at 180°C or until the rice is tender and golden brown.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves before serving.
